title: Count PASS variants
description: Count how many variants in a small VCF have FILTER=PASS. Tests basic VCF parsing and FILTER-column awareness.
task_prompt: You are given a VCF file at sample.vcf in your working directory. Count the number of variant records (non-header lines) where the FILTER column equals exactly 'PASS'. Write your answer as JSON to eval_answer.json with the schema: {"n_pass": <integer>}. Do not include header lines (lines starting with #) in your count.

inputs.description: Small synthetic VCF, 10 variants, mixed FILTER values

notes: First canonical eval. Synthetic VCF intentionally small so the entire problem is auditable by eye.
